name: atlas
description: Atlas — AI multi-repository engineering intelligence platform (monorepo)

scripts.test: node services/indexer-spike/test/run.ts && node services/indexer-spike/test/org.run.ts && node services/indexer-spike/test/retrieval.run.ts && node services/indexer-spike/test/analyze.run.ts && node services/indexer-spike/test/agent.run.ts && node services/indexer-spike/test/api-extract.run.ts && node services/indexer-spike/test/env-extract.run.ts && node services/indexer-spike/test/datastore-extract.run.ts && node services/indexer-spike/test/fullgraph.run.ts && node services/indexer-spike/test/transitive.run.ts && node services/indexer-spike/test/eval.run.ts && node apps/api/test/api.run.ts

//: pnpm + Turborepo is the design target (docs/01 §4); npm workspaces is used for the Phase-0 bootstrap because pnpm is not installed on the current toolchain. Migrating to pnpm is a drop-in once available.
